attributes.name: [Kafka OTel] High consumer lag by topic

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
// Topic-level lag sum (aggregate across partitions for a consumer group)
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag_sum = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum)
  BY attributes.group, attributes.topic
// Threshold: total lag for group on topic. Adjust for expected throughput
| WHERE lag_sum > 50000
| SORT lag_sum DESC
